lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਕੰਤੁ ਮਹੇਲੀਆ ਰੂੜੈ ਹੇਤਿ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: ghar ghar kant maheleea roorrai het piaare |
lines.english: In each and every home, are the brides of the Husband Lord; they gaze upon their Handsome Lord with love and affection.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਮੁਠੜੀ ਧੰਧੈ ਧਾਵਣੀਆ ਪਿਰਿ ਛੋਡਿਅੜੀ ਵਿਧਣਕਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: hau muttharree dhandhai dhaavaneea pir chhoddiarree vidhanakaare |
lines.english: I too have been defrauded, chasing after worldly entanglements; my Husband Lord has forsaken me - I practice the evil deeds of a wife without a spouse.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਪਿਰੁ ਸਚੁ ਸਾਲਾਹਣਾ ਹਉ ਰਹਸਿਅੜੀ ਨਾਮਿ ਭਤਾਰੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: mai pir sach saalaahanaa hau rahasiarree naam bhataare |7|
lines.english: I sing the Praises of my True Husband Lord, and through the Naam, the Name of my Husband Lord, I blossom forth. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਵੇਸੁ ਪਲਟਿਆ ਸਾ ਧਨ ਸਚੁ ਸੀਗਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: gur miliai ves palattiaa saa dhan sach seegaaro |
lines.english: Meeting with the Guru, the soul-bride's dress is transformed, and she is adorned with Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਹੁ ਮਿਲਹੁ ਸਹੇਲੀਹੋ ਸਿਮਰਹੁ ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: aavahu milahu saheleeho simarahu sirajanahaaro |
lines.english: Come and meet with me, O brides of the Lord; let's meditate in remembrance on the Creator Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਈਅਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸੋੁਹਾਗਣੀ ਸਚੁ ਸਵਾਰਣਹਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: beear naam souhaaganee sach savaaranahaaro |
lines.english: Through the Naam, the soul-bride becomes the Lord's favorite; she is adorned with Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਜਗੁ ਸਿਰਜਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ ਸੋ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਜਾਣੋਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: jin jag siraj samaaeaa so saahib kudarat jaanovaa |
lines.english: The One who creates and dissolves the world - that Lord and Master alone knows His creative power.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵਹੁ ਗੀਤੁ ਨ ਬਿਰਹੜਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਬੀਚਾਰੋ ॥੮॥੩॥
lines.translit: gaavahu geet na biraharraa naanak braham beechaaro |8|3|
lines.english: Do not sing the songs of separation, O Nanak; reflect upon God. ||8||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਹੰਸੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: vaddahans mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Wadahans, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੜਾ ਦੂਰਿ ਨ ਭਾਲੀਐ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਪਛਾਣੋਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: sacharraa door na bhaaleeai ghatt ghatt sabad pachhaanovaa |
lines.english: Do not search for the True Lord far away; recognize the Word of the Shabad in each and every heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਪਛਾਣਹੁ ਦੂਰਿ ਨ ਜਾਣਹੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਏਹ ਰਚਨਾ ਰਾਚੀ ॥
lines.translit: sach sabad pachhaanahu door na jaanahu jin eeh rachanaa raachee |
lines.english: Recognize the Shabad, and do not think that the Lord is far away; He created this creation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਏ ਤਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਪਿੜ ਕਾਚੀ ॥
lines.translit: naam dhiaae taa sukh paae bin naavai pirr kaachee |
lines.english: Meditating on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, one obtains peace; without the Naam, he plays a losing game.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਜਗੁ ਥਾਪਿ ਵਤਾਇਆ ਜਾਲੋੁ ਸੋ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਪਰਵਾਣੋ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jin jag thaap vataaeaa jaalo so saahib paravaano |1|
lines.english: The One who established the world cast the net of Maya over it; accept Him as your Lord and Master. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਥਾਪੀ ਬਿਧਿ ਜਾਣੈ ਸੋਈ ਕਿਆ ਕੋ ਕਹੈ ਵਖਾਣੋ ॥
lines.translit: jin thaapee bidh jaanai soee kiaa ko kahai vakhaano |
lines.english: The One who established the Universe, He alone knows the Way; what can anyone say?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰਿ ਸਿਰਿ ਸਚੜੈ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਦੁਖੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਪੁਰਬਿ ਵੀਚਾਰੋਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: sir sir sacharrai likhiaa dukh sukh purab veechaarovaa |
lines.english: Upon each and every head, the True Lord writes their destiny of pain and pleasure, according to their past actions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬਾ ਆਇਆ ਹੈ ਉਠਿ ਚਲਣਾ ਅਧ ਪੰਧੈ ਹੈ ਸੰਸਾਰੋਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: baabaa aaeaa hai utth chalanaa adh pandhai hai sansaarovaa |
lines.english: O Baba, he has come, and now he must get up and depart; this world is only a way-station.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਹੇ ਕਰਮ ਕਰਾਏ ਕਰਤਾ ਦੂਜੀ ਕਾਰ ਨ ਭਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: jehe karam karaae karataa doojee kaar na bhaale |
lines.english: He does those deeds which the Creator Lord causes him to do; he attempts no other actions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਦੀਆ ਜੇਹਾ ਕੀਆ ਸੋ ਨਿਬਹੈ ਜੀਅ ਨਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: dukh sukh deea jehaa keea so nibahai jeea naale |
lines.english: He bestows pain and pleasure, according to the deeds done; the record of these deeds stays with the soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਨਿਰਾਲਮੁ ਧੰਧੈ ਬਾਧੀ ਕਰਿ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਛਡਾਵਣਹਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: aap niraalam dhandhai baadhee kar hukam chhaddaavanahaaro |
lines.english: The Lord Himself is detached, while the world is entangled in conflict; by His Command, He emancipates it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਜੁ ਕਲਿ ਕਰਦਿਆ ਕਾਲੁ ਬਿਆਪੈ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਵਿਕਾਰੋ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aj kal karadiaa kaal biaapai doojai bhaae vikaaro |2|
lines.english: He may put this off today, but tomorrow he is seized by death; in love with duality, he practices corruption. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮ ਮਾਰਗ ਪੰਥੁ ਨ ਸੁਝਈ ਉਝੜੁ ਅੰਧ ਗੁਬਾਰੋਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: jam maarag panth na sujhee ujharr andh gubaarovaa |
lines.english: The path of death is dark and dismal; the way cannot be seen.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਜਲੁ ਲੇਫ ਤੁਲਾਈਆ ਨਾ ਭੋਜਨ ਪਰਕਾਰੋਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: naa jal lef tulaaeea naa bhojan parakaarovaa |
lines.english: There is no water, no quilt or mattress, and no food there.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੋਜਨ ਭਾਉ ਨ ਠੰਢਾ ਪਾਣੀ ਨਾ ਕਾਪੜੁ ਸੀਗਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: bhojan bhaau na tthandtaa paanee naa kaaparr seegaaro |
lines.english: He receives no food there, no honor or water, no clothes or decorations.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਲਿ ਸੰਗਲੁ ਸਿਰਿ ਮਾਰੇ ਊਭੌ ਨਾ ਦੀਸੈ ਘਰ ਬਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: gal sangal sir maare aoobhau naa deesai ghar baaro |
lines.english: The chain is put around his neck, and the Messenger of Death standing over his head strikes him; he cannot see the door of his home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਾਚੇ ਕੋ ਬੇਲੀ ਨਾਹੀ ਸਾਚਾ ਏਹੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੋ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: bin saache ko belee naahee saachaa ehu beechaaro |3|
lines.english: Without the True Lord, no one is his friend; reflect upon this as true. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਬ ਕੇ ਰਾਹੇ ਜੰਮਨਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਪਛੁਤਾਣੇ ਸਿਰਿ ਭਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: eib ke raahe jaman naahee pachhutaane sir bhaaro |
lines.english: The seeds planted on this path do not sprout; bearing the weight of his sins upon his head, he regrets and repents.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬਾ ਰੋਵਹਿ ਰਵਹਿ ਸੁ ਜਾਣੀਅਹਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਰੋਵੈ ਗੁਣ ਸਾਰੇਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: baabaa roveh raveh su jaaneeeh mil rovai gun saarevaa |
lines.english: O Baba, they alone are known to truly weep and wail, who meet together and weep, chanting the Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੋਵੈ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੁਠੜੀ ਧੰਧੜਾ ਰੋਵਣਹਾਰੇਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: rovai maaeaa muttharree dhandharraa rovanahaarevaa |
lines.english: Defrauded by Maya and worldly affairs, the weepers weep.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਧਾ ਰੋਵੈ ਮੈਲੁ ਨ ਧੋਵੈ ਸੁਪਨੰਤਰੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: dhandhaa rovai mail na dhovai supanantar sansaaro |
lines.english: They weep for the sake of worldly affairs, and they do not wash off their own filth; the world is merely a dream.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਪਾਵਣਹਾਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: aape maarag paavanahaaraa aape karam kamaae |
lines.english: The Lord Himself reveals the Path; He Himself is the Doer of deeds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਬਾਜੀਗਰੁ ਭਰਮੈ ਭੂਲੈ ਝੂਠਿ ਮੁਠੀ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: jiau baajeegar bharamai bhoolai jhootth mutthee ahankaaro |
lines.english: Like the juggler, deceiving by his tricks, one is deluded by egotism, falsehood and illusion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਰਾਖੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਏ ॥੪॥੪॥
lines.translit: naam rate gur poorai raakhe naanak sehaj subhaae |4|4|
lines.english: Those who are imbued with the Naam, are protected by the Perfect Guru, O Nanak; they merge in celestial bliss. ||4||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਹੰਸੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: vaddahans mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Wadahans, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਘਰੁ ਸਚੜੈ ਸੇਵੀਐ ਸਚੁ ਖਰਾ ਸਚਿਆਰੋਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa ghar sacharrai seveeai sach kharaa sachiaarovaa |
lines.english: One's true home is obtained by serving the True Lord; real Truth is obtained by being truthful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬਾ ਆਇਆ ਹੈ ਉਠਿ ਚਲਣਾ ਇਹੁ ਜਗੁ ਝੂਠੁ ਪਸਾਰੋਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: baabaa aaeaa hai utth chalanaa ihu jag jhootth pasaarovaa |
lines.english: O Baba, whoever has come, will rise up and leave; this world is merely a false show.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਆਉ ਨ ਬੈਸਹੁ ਕਹੀਐ ਜਿਉ ਸੁੰਞੈ ਘਰਿ ਕਾਓ ॥
lines.translit: antar aau na baisahu kaheeai jiau sunyai ghar kaao |
lines.english: No one invites him to come in and sit down. He is like a crow in a deserted home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜਿ ਲਬਿ ਜਾਂ ਥਾਇ ਨ ਪਾਸੀ ਅਗੈ ਲਹੈ ਨ ਠਾਓ ॥
lines.translit: koorr lab jaan thaae na paasee agai lahai na tthaao |
lines.english: By falsehood and greed, no place of rest is found, and no place in the world hereafter is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਬਿ ਧੰਧੈ ਮਾਇਆ ਜਗਤੁ ਭੁਲਾਇਆ ਕਾਲੁ ਖੜਾ ਰੂਆਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: lab dhandhai maaeaa jagat bhulaaeaa kaal kharraa rooaae |1|
lines.english: Greed, worldly entanglements and Maya deceive the world. Death hovers over its head, and causes it to weep. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੰਮਣੁ ਮਰਣੁ ਵਡਾ ਵੇਛੋੜਾ ਬਿਨਸੈ ਜਗੁ ਸਬਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jaman maran vaddaa vechhorraa binasai jag sabaae |
lines.english: Trapped by birth and death, he is separated from the Lord for such a long time; the whole world is wasting away.
